org.jlab.epsci.ersap.engine

Class EngineDataType

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.engine.EngineDataType

  • public class EngineDataType
extends java.lang.Object
    Defines a data type used by a service engine. Data type can be a predefined type, or a custom-defined type. When declaring a custom type, its serialization routine must be provided.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static EngineDataType ARRAY_DOUBLE
      An array of doubles (64 bits floating-point numbers).
      static EngineDataType ARRAY_FLOAT
      An array of floats (32 bits floating-point numbers).
      static EngineDataType ARRAY_SFIXED32
      An array of signed fixed integers of 32 bits.
      static EngineDataType ARRAY_SFIXED64
      An array of signed fixed integers of 64 bits.
      static EngineDataType ARRAY_SINT32
      An array of signed varints of 32 bits.
      static EngineDataType ARRAY_SINT64
      An array of signed varints of 64 bits.
      static EngineDataType ARRAY_STRING
      An array of strings.
      static EngineDataType BYTES
      Raw bytes.
      static EngineDataType DOUBLE
      A double (64 bits floating-point number).
      static EngineDataType FLOAT
      A float (32 bits floating-point number).
      static EngineDataType JSON
      JSON text.
      static EngineDataType NATIVE_DATA
      A native xMsg data object.
      static EngineDataType NATIVE_PAYLOAD
      A native xMsg payload object.
      static EngineDataType SFIXED32
      Signed fixed integer of 32 bits.
      static EngineDataType SFIXED64
      Signed fixed integer of 64 bits.
      static EngineDataType SINT32
      Signed int of 32 bits.
      static EngineDataType SINT64
      Signed int of 64 bits.
      static EngineDataType STRING
      A string.

        public static final EngineDataType DOUBLE
        A double (64 bits floating-point number).

      • STRING

        public static final EngineDataType STRING
        A string.

      • BYTES

        public static final EngineDataType BYTES
        Raw bytes. On Java a ByteBuffer is used to wrap the byte array and its endianess.

    • Constructor Detail

      • EngineDataType

        public EngineDataType(java.lang.String mimeType,
                      ErsapSerializer serializer)
        Creates a new user data type. The data type is identified by its mime-type string. The serializer will be used in order to send data through the network, or to a different language DPE.
        Parameters:
        mimeType - the name of this data-type
        serializer - the custom serializer for this data-type

    • Method Detail

      • mimeType

        public java.lang.String mimeType()
        Returns the name of this data type.
        Returns:
        the mime-type string

      • serializer

        public ErsapSerializer serializer()
        Returns the serializer of this data type.
        Returns:
        the serializer object

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
